input:
Dear Valued Customer,

We noticed some unusuall activity on your account. Plese review the attached documant and confirm your recent transactions.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

Hello,

I hope this email finds u wel. We recieved a request to update some account informasion. Could you plz confirm the attached file contanes the currect details?

Regards,
Support Team

From: SecureBank Support <alerts@secure-bank-verify.com>
Subject: IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED - Account Suspension

Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected SUSPICIOUS activity on your bank account. To prevent potential fraud, your online banking will be PERMANENTLY LOCKED in 24 hours unless you IMMEDIATELY verify your identity.

Click HERE to verify: http://secure-bank-authentication.xyz/login

FAILURE TO VERIFY WILL RESULT IN ACCOUNT CLOSURE AND POTENTIAL FINANCIAL PENALTIES.

Urgently,
SecureBank Security Team

Hi Dana,

We hope this email finds you well! Just a quick update about your recent purchase from Gadget World. Your order #5623 has been processed and is scheduled for shipping tomorrow. We'll send a tracking number once it's dispatched.

Thanks for shopping with us!

Best regards,
The Gadget World Team

P.S. There's a small typo in our shipping address - we're working on fixing that soon.
